problem id: 3370302a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10001011 -> 00011110
  11111001 -> 11111101
  01110010 -> 11100011
  10001001 -> 00011010
  11111110 -> 11110011
  11001110 -> 10010000
  10001010 -> 00011100
  11001101 -> 10010110

query: 10000101
predicted answer: 00000010
